judge_reason: Description B quotes specific stamped/typed text (e.g., '62-83894', 'AUG 12 1958') and file numbers not mentioned by Description A, while Description A describes a 'UPI news wire story' which Description B contradicts by describing it as a 'UPI news clipping with typewritten text describing a UFO sighting'.
original_image_tags: A torn, aged piece of orange/yellow teletype paper is affixed horizontally across the center of a white paper. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top and appears aged. The teletype paper contains a UPI news wire story. Handwritten annotations in pencil and pen are visible below and to the side of the clipping.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned paper document page with handwritten title “FLYING SAUCERS,” an orange typed newspaper clipping taped across the middle, and several handwritten initials, file numbers, and date stamps near the bottom.*
